debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ ContDiffOn ℝ (↑⊤) (Φ₆' r) upperHalfPlaneSet

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
smoothness
  have h₂ : ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ (Φ₆' r) ℍ₀ := by
    have h₃ : ∀ (z : ℂ), z ∈ ℍ₀ → ContDiffAt ℝ ∞ z (Φ₆' r) := by
      intro z hz
      -- Since Φ₆' is holomorphic on ℍ₀, it is contDiffOn ℂ ∞ at every point in ℍ₀
      have h₄ : ContDiffAt ℂ ∞ z (Φ₆' r) := h₁.contDiffAt (isOpen_upperHalfPlaneSet.mem_nhds hz)
      -- Convert complex contDiffAt to real contDiffAt
      have h₅ : ContDiffAt ℝ ∞ z (Φ₆' r) := by
        -- Use the fact that complex contDiffAt implies real contDiffAt
        have h₆ : ContDiffAt ℝ ∞ z (fun z : ℂ => (Φ₆' r z : ℂ)) := by
          -- Use the fact that complex contDiffAt implies real contDiffAt
          apply h₄.of_complex
        -- Convert back to real function
        simpa [Complex.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff] using h₆
      exact h₅
    -- Use the contDiffAt result to deduce contDiffOn
    have h₄ : ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ (Φ₆' r) ℍ₀ := by
      -- Use the contDiffAt result to deduce contDiffOn
      refine' contDiffOn_of_contDiffAt _
      intro z hz
      exact h₃ z hz
    exact h₄
  exact h₂
